gap_statement: Current coverage appears to underrepresent Chinese-language or Chinese-context studies.
counter_evidence: Paper 06_2013_brosseau_trf: Study conducted in Xi'an, China with 495 questionnaire respondents and 989 videotape samples
Paper 08_2016_zhou_aap: Study conducted in Dalian, China with 260 respondents
Paper 11_2013_yang_trb: Field data from signalized intersection in Kunming, China with 283 observations
Paper 12_2016_zhang_aap: Survey data from Hefei, China with 631 valid samples

gap_statement: There are unresolved claim differences across papers under the same task, suggesting a need for clearer comparison criteria.
